name: codex-fast-proxy
description: Codex App proxy for third-party OpenAI-compatible Responses API providers with Fast/Priority controls.

interface.shortDescription: Third-party API proxy for Codex App with Fast/Priority controls.
interface.longDescription: Manage a local, safety-bounded proxy and Agent Skill so Codex App users on third-party OpenAI-compatible API providers can preserve the App Fast toggle, optionally force global Fast/Priority, split upstream auth for ChatGPT login, verify traffic, benchmark, update, and uninstall.
